payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Pair of tall, dark-stained wooden cabinet doors with recessed rectangular panels and a vertical seam between them; smooth medium-gloss finish with a soft highlight near the upper center, no visible handles, and the lower edge is slightly cut off by the crop; appears to be close to the camera (around 0.8 m).
